overrides.override_summary: Venue must be in Illinois; cannot designate outside IL
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisees can litigate locally instead of traveling to Utah

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs the Franchise Agreement
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchise protections apply instead of Utah law

overrides.override_summary: Termination/non-renewal rights per IL Franchise Disclosure Act Sections 19-20
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional protections beyond franchise agreement terms

overrides.override_summary: Statute of limitations (Section 18.11) deleted entirely
overrides.why_it_matters: IL statute of limitations applies instead of 1-year contractual limit

overrides.override_summary: Anti-waiver provision; no waiver of IL franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to waive IL franchise law rights

overrides.override_summary: Release cannot waive Indiana franchise law rights
overrides.why_it_matters: IN franchise law protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Jury trial waiver and litigation limitations not enforceable in IN
overrides.why_it_matters: Right to jury trial preserved for IN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: General release on renewal/transfer excludes MD Franchise Law liability
overrides.why_it_matters: Cannot be forced to release MD franchise law claims on renewal or transfer

overrides.override_summary: Any MD franchise claims may be brought in Federal District Court in Maryland
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisees can sue in MD for MD franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: 3-year statute of limitations for MD franchise claims
overrides.why_it_matters: 3 years instead of 1-year contractual limit

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require litigation outside Minnesota
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchisees can litigate locally

overrides.override_summary: No jury trial waiver; no liquidated damages; no termination penalties; 3-year SOL
overrides.why_it_matters: Broad protections against one-sided contract provisions

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination (60 cure); 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly more time to cure or prepare for non-renewal than base agreement

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require release of MN franchise law claims on renewal or assignment
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise law rights preserved through renewal/transfer

overrides.override_summary: Subject to MN franchise law protections (MN Stat 80C)
overrides.why_it_matters: MN law limits enforceability

overrides.override_summary: Article 33 of General Business Law rights preserved; anti-waiver provision
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law protections cannot be waived

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate on any grounds available by law
overrides.why_it_matters: Broader termination rights than base agreement

overrides.override_summary: Post-term covenants not to compete generally unenforceable in ND
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchisees can compete after termination

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require litigation, arbitration, or mediation outside ND
overrides.why_it_matters: All dispute resolution must be accessible in ND

overrides.override_summary: No punitive damages waiver; no jury trial waiver; no liquidated damages; no limitation of claims; prevailing party attorney fees
overrides.why_it_matters: Most comprehensive franchisee protections of any state

overrides.override_summary: ND law governs franchise claims; ND statute of limitations applies
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchise law applies instead of Utah law for franchise claims

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require general release upon renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Renewal cannot be conditioned on releasing past claims

overrides.override_summary: Venue restriction void for RI franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchisees can litigate locally for RI franchise claims

overrides.override_summary: Choice of law restriction void for RI franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchise law applies instead of Utah law

overrides.override_summary: Cancellation without reasonable cause is unlawful per VA Retail Franchising Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional termination protection

overrides.override_summary: 90 days written notice (60 cure); 10 days cure for nonpayment
overrides.why_it_matters: More cure time than base agreement

overrides.override_summary: WI Fair Dealership Law supersedes any inconsistent franchise agreement provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: WI law provides overriding protections
